title: Bids to fly in rear seat of Spitfire from Prestwick Airport reach £8k

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Bids to fly in rear seat of Spitfire from Prestwick Airport reach £8k. A one-in-a-lifetime opportunity to fly in the rear seat of a Spitfire from Prestwick Airport will cost at least £8000.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Bids to fly in rear seat of Spitfire from Prestwick Airport reach £8k
